title: ReadProcessMemory Wrapper

title: Get Module Base Address
description: Enumerate process modules with Toolhelp32 to find a DLL base address.

title: Pattern (AOB) Scanner
description: Scan a memory region for a byte pattern with wildcard support (?? bytes).

title: Parse PE DOS Header
description: Validate MZ signature and read e_lfanew to locate NT headers.

title: Read Virtual Function from VTable
description: Dereference object pointer to vtable and call function at index N.

title: Remote LoadLibrary Injection
description: Educational pattern: allocate path in remote process and call LoadLibraryA via CreateRemoteThread.

title: x64 Microsoft Calling Convention
description: Reference for register argument order in x64 Windows ABI.
code:
; x64 Microsoft calling convention (Windows)
; First 4 integer/pointer args: RCX, RDX, R8, R9
; Additional args on stack (right-to-left)
; Return value in RAX (or XMM0 for floats)
; Caller must reserve 32 bytes shadow space before CALL
; Callee-saved: RBX, RBP, RDI, RSI, R12-R15

; Example: MessageBoxA(hwnd, "text", "title", MB_OK)
; RCX = hwnd
; RDX = lpText
; R8  = lpCaption
; R9  = uType (0)

title: Set Hardware Breakpoint (DR Registers)
description: Use debug registers DR0-DR3 for execute breakpoints without patching code.

title: Manual Export Table Resolution
description: Resolve a function address from PE export directory without LoadLibrary.

title: NtQueryInformationProcess — PEB Address
description: Query process basic information to get PEB address from ntdll syscall.
